licenseNotes: Use as research and pattern analysis. Do not copy screenshots, product names, flows, or proprietary layouts into generated work without permission.
extractedSignals: Real product references reveal how interfaces solve specific workflows, not just how marketing pages look.
D-ZINE should ask what job the screen performs before selecting a layout style.
Pattern references need critique labels: where the pattern works, when it fails, and what constraints make it appropriate.
